title: Boat Subaru Impreza
body:
## Overview
Boat Subaru Impreza is a small resource pack that adds 16 cars you can drive. Usually I use it with [Boat HUD (from NFS Most Wanted 2005)]() to get better drive experience. This is CEM resource pack, so it needs [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine to work

![Example](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-nfs/blob/main/1.gif?raw=true)


## Car models, colors
### Models
1. Chest boat - seat and engine
2. Boat - two seats
### Colors
1. Oak - original blue
2. Spruce - dark gray
3. Birch - light gray
4. Jungle - green
5. Acacia - brown
6. Dark oak - black
7. Mangrove - dark red
8. Cherry - pink

![Colors](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud-nfs/blob/main/2.jpg?raw=true)


## Dependencies
1. This is CEM resource pack, so it needs [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine to work.
2. (optional) To see glowing lights use [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or Optifine. Advice: in ETF configurations set "Bright" mode for emissive textures to make lights brighter


## Credits
Based on [Renokas1](https://www.youtube.com/@Renokas1)'s very old version of Renokas Subaru resource pack (ported to cem, changed interior, fixed some colors, added shadows, wheels, emissive lights)
